items.title: Enhance Bilibili Submission Handling in Publisher 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the handling of Bilibili's API responses, specifically addressing the HTTP 412 anti-bot response. When a 412 status is encountered, the system now gracefully returns the draft URL instead of failing, ensuring that users can still access their drafts. This change enhances user experience by allowing manual publishing even when automated submissions are blocked.

items.title: Enhance Auto-Repair Pipeline for Better Performance in Publisher 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the auto-repair pipeline by fixing several key issues, including the addition of missing SKIP_REPAIR_PATTERNS to reduce spam and resolving a Unicode encoding bug in the Zhihu API. The assign-copilot workflow has been updated to use the correct token, enhancing automation. Additionally, Bilibili category coverage has been expanded with new IDs, improving error logging and overall functionality.

items.title: Enhance success response handling in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update fixes the ttapi Suno responses by ensuring that the 'success' field is included in the final results. The change was made in the base handler's sendSuccessResult method, adding 'success: true' when it is not already present. This improvement enhances the reliability of success responses across the platform.

items.title: Enhance Midjourney Error Reporting in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves error handling for Midjourney submissions by preserving detailed failure messages instead of generic errors. Key changes include enhancements to the BaseError class and the addition of fallback mechanisms across various handlers, ensuring better logging and user feedback. These modifications will significantly improve the debugging process and user experience.

items.title: Enhance SERP Geo-Targeting with Location Parameter in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the geo-targeting accuracy for SERP results by adding support for a location parameter, which is automatically derived from the country code. Over 60 countries are now mapped to enhance the relevance of search results for users specifying their country and language. This change aims to reduce the occurrence of results from unintended regions.

items.title: Streamline WebExtrator Tracking in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces WebExtrator as a tracked submodule, enhancing the organization of the Index repository. Local .worktrees metadata is now ignored, reducing clutter and ensuring a cleaner workspace. Additionally, VS Code settings have been synchronized for improved development consistency.

items.title: Fix Claude SDK Executable Issue in We Chat Claude Code 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves a critical issue where the Claude SDK's `cli.js` could not be executed from within a packaged Electron app due to its location inside the `app.asar` archive. A new function, `resolveClaudeCodePath()`, has been added to detect the environment and correctly resolve the executable path, ensuring seamless operation. All existing tests have passed, confirming the fix's effectiveness.

items.title: Enhance Production Queue and Add Smoke Tests in Web Extrator 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a dedicated Redis deployment for the WebExtrator, along with improved handling for 429/503 errors in the production queue. Additionally, in-repo smoke validation has been implemented, ensuring robust testing during production rollouts. Key files modified include deployment configurations and the addition of a new smoke testing script.

items.title: Sync Model Selectors with Official Docs in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update synchronizes the Nexior model selectors with the latest backend OpenAPI specifications and official documentation. Key changes include updating the default model for Suno to 'chirp-v5', adding new model options for Kling, Veo, and Hailuo, and enhancing internationalization support for Hailuo's Director mode. These improvements ensure users have access to the most current model options available.

items.title: Exciting Update: Kimi Models Added with Priority Adjustments in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: We've successfully integrated Kimi models across all four providers, ensuring a proper priority ranking. The new models include 'kimi-k2-thinking-turbo' and 'kimi-k2.5' for xiaojingai and openaihk, while wcnb's model rank has been adjusted. This enhancement will improve the performance and capabilities of our service.

items.title: Update API Token Instructions in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update corrects the API token variable name from `ACEDATACLOUD_API_TOKEN` to `ACEDATACLOUD_API_KEY` in the testing instructions. Additionally, a warning has been added to clarify that `ACEDATACLOUD_PLATFORM_TOKEN` should not be used for API calls. These changes enhance clarity and prevent potential misuse of tokens.

items.title: Streamline platform documentation by removing obsolete balance doc in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the outdated zh-CN platform balance document, streamlining our documentation. The application remaining amount will continue to be the supported query path. Corresponding translation records have also been deleted from the database, ensuring a cleaner codebase.

items.title: Update markdown-it to 14.1.1 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the markdown-it library from version 14.1.0 to 14.1.1, addressing a performance regression in the linkify inline rule that could lead to high CPU usage. The changes also include improved documentation and minor adjustments in the package files. This ensures better performance and security for our frontend components.

items.title: Fix upstream billing error detection in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses the misclassification of upstream billing errors as content moderation ForbiddenErrors. The system now correctly identifies billing-related issues and returns an ApiError (500) for specific billing keywords. This change enhances error handling across multiple services including wcnb, openaihk, mountsea, and cqtai.

items.title: Update ESLint Plugin for Enhanced Compatibility in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the eslint-plugin-html from version 6.2.0 to 8.1.4, ensuring compatibility with ESLint 10 and updating dependencies. Key improvements include fixes for compatibility issues and the introduction of new settings for better HTML linting. This change enhances the overall development experience by ensuring up-to-date tooling.

items.title: Update Rollup Plugin to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @rollup/plugin-replace from version 3.0.1 to 6.0.3, enhancing the plugin's functionality and fixing several bugs. Key improvements include better handling of valid JavaScript identifier characters and additional type definitions. This change is expected to improve the overall stability and performance of the build process.

items.title: Update Solana Web3.js to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @solana/web3.js library from version 1.98.2 to 1.98.4. Key changes include the addition of Cost Units for transaction costs and the reversion of a previous change regarding costUnits in transaction classes. This ensures improved functionality and stability in our application.

items.title: Upgrade element-plus to latest version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the element-plus library from version 2.11.2 to 2.13.6. Key enhancements include new features for components like slider and input, as well as various bug fixes that improve overall stability and performance.
